micro_plan: Verify existing implementation: story_drafts migration + RLS, feeds-to-drafts edge fn (no auto-publish), AdminStoryDrafts TanStack Query + approve/reject/publish; run tsc, build, authoring-core-schema-validator, hub-shell-detector; write verify JSON; update build_tracker.
scope: story_drafts table + RLS + auto-ingest pipeline (feeds→drafts); NO auto-publish, human-in-loop

build.block_reason: PWA/service worker write failure: vite-plugin-pwa/workbox terser renderChunk unfinished on exit. Pre-existing; not caused by CMS-WO-07.

authoring-core-schema-validator.evidence: story_drafts table in migrations 20260313000034_story_drafts.sql (RLS, fingerprint dedup, pg_cron feeds-to-drafts schedule), 20260313000037_cms_publish_draft_rpc.sql (publish_story_draft RPC draft→cms_posts), 20260313000041_story_drafts_suggested_products.sql. Publish path: draft must be status=approved; RPC creates cms_posts row and sets story_drafts.promoted_post_id. PageRenderer/block types present in src/components/cms/PageRenderer.tsx and BlockRenderer.

hub-shell-detector.evidence: AdminStoryDrafts.tsx: useQuery (story_drafts list by status, counts), useMutation (approve, reject, publish_story_draft RPC). Loading: DraftSkeleton; empty: EmptyDrafts; error: retry + refetch. List from DB, actions Approve/Reject/Publish wired to Supabase. No static-only content; not a shell.

implementation_evidence.rls: admin_all_story_drafts policy (is_admin()), ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY
implementation_evidence.feeds_to_drafts: supabase/functions/feeds-to-drafts/index.ts (rss_items→story_drafts, status=pending, ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING, kill-switch feature_flags.feeds-to-drafts)
implementation_evidence.admin_ui: src/pages/admin/cms/AdminStoryDrafts.tsx (tabs pending/approved/rejected/published, TanStack Query, publish_story_draft RPC)
implementation_evidence.no_auto_publish: feeds-to-drafts inserts status=pending only; publish_story_draft requires status=approved and is_admin(). Human-in-loop confirmed.
